description: Named launch presets for safe testing-harness entry points. These presets are intentionally operational rather than scientific: they encode recommended launch shapes such as a cheap first paid pilot.

paid_narrow_pilot.description: Cheapest recommended first paid pilot. Uses one medium-difficulty focused recovery task and only the query-verbosity sweep family.

broad_default_sweep.description: Full default experimental sweep. Useful after the pilot passes, but intentionally expensive and likely to trip the default budget guardrails until thresholds are raised deliberately.
